headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks We Think Twice About
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

headline: Halliburton (HAL) Up 8.2% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Halliburton (HAL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
